title: "Untitled"
format: html: 


```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler, OneHotEncoder
from sklearn.impute import SimpleImputer
from sklearn.pipeline import make_pipeline
from sklearn.compose import make_column_selector, ColumnTransformer
from sklearn.base import BaseEstimator, TransformerMixin
```

```{python}
pokemon = pd.read_csv("../data/pokemon.csv") 
pokemon.head()
```

```{python}
pokemon.drop(columns = ["#", "Name", "Type 2", "Total", "Generation"], inplace = True)
```

```{python}
pokemon.drop_duplicates(inplace = True)
```

```{python}
pokemon_train, pokemon_test = train_test_split(pokemon, test_size = 0.30, stratify = pokemon["Legendary"], random_state = 1234)
```

```{python}
X_train = pokemon_train.drop(columns = ["Legendary"])
y_train = pokemon_train["Legendary"].copy()
``` 

```{python}
class TextCleaner(BaseEstimator, TransformerMixin):
    '''
    Convierte texto a minúsculas y elimina
    espacios al inicio/final. Los valores nulos
    (NaN/None) se preservan sin modificación.
    '''

    ## Método fit() no realiza nada
    def fit(self, X, y = None):
        return self

    ## Método transform()
    def transform(self, X):
        ## Convertir a data frame
        X = pd.DataFrame(X).copy()

        ## Quitar espacios y convertir a minúscula
        ## cada una de los valores de las columnas
        ## afectadas sólo si existe información, en
        ## caso contrario se deja el valor intacto
        ## Al finalizar, se devuelve un arreglo
        X_clean = X.apply(lambda col: col.map(
                            lambda val: val.strip().lower() if isinstance(val, str) else val)).values

        return X_clean

    ## Método get_feature_names_out()
    ## Obtener los nombres de las variables
    def get_feature_names_out(self, input_features = None):
        if input_features is not None:
            return np.array(input_features)
        if hasattr(self, "feature_names_in_"):
            return self.feature_names_in_
        return np.array([f"x{i}" for i in range(self.n_features_in_)])
```

```{python}
clean_text_pipeline = make_pipeline(TextCleaner(), SimpleImputer(strategy = "most_frequent"), OneHotEncoder(handle_unknown = "ignore", sparse_output = False)) 
```

```{python}
num_pipeline = make_pipeline(SimpleImputer(strategy = "median"), StandardScaler())
```

```{python}
preprocessing = ColumnTransformer([("cat", clean_text_pipeline, ["Type 1"]), ("num", num_pipeline, make_column_selector(dtype_include = np.number))]) 
```

```{python}
X_prepared = preprocessing.fit_transform(X_train)
```

```{python}
k = np.sqrt(len(X_train)) 
```

```{python}
from sklearn.neighbors import KNeighborsClassifier 

knn_clf = make_pipeline(preprocessing, KNeighborsClassifier(n_neighbors = int(k))) 
```

```{python}
knn_clf.fit(X_train, y_train) 
```

```{python}
accuracy = knn_clf.score(X_train, y_train)
```

```{python}
from sklearn.model_selection import StratifiedKFold

skf = StratifiedKFold(n_splits = 10)
```

```{python}
score = []
```

```{python}
for train, validation in skf.split(X_train, y_train):
    ## Ajustamos el modelo sobre
    ## el subset de entrenamiento
    knn_clf.fit(X_train.iloc[train], y_train.iloc[train])

    ## Obtenemos la accuracy
    ## sobre el validation set
    score.append(knn_clf.score(X_train.iloc[validation], y_train.iloc[validation]))
```

```{python}
np.array(score).mean()
```

```{python}
from sklearn.model_selection import cross_val_score

cv_10 = cross_val_score(estimator = knn_clf,
                        cv = 10,
                        X = X_train,
                        y = y_train,
                        scoring = "accuracy")
```

```{python}
pd.Series(cv_10).describe()
```

```{python}
knn_clf = make_pipeline(preprocessing, KNeighborsClassifier())
```

```{python}
knn_clf.get_params()
```

```{python}
parameter_grid = {"kneighborsclassifier__n_neighbors": range(1, 50)}
```

```{python}
from sklearn.model_selection import GridSearchCV

grid_search = GridSearchCV(estimator = knn_clf,
                           param_grid = parameter_grid,
                           cv = 10,
                           n_jobs = -1) 
```

```{python}
grid_search.fit(X_train, y_train) 
```

```{python}
cv_res = pd.DataFrame(grid_search.cv_results_)
```

```{python}
cv_res["sem_test_score"] = cv_res["std_test_score"]/np.sqrt(10)
```

```{python}
cv_res = cv_res[["param_kneighborsclassifier__n_neighbors",
                 "mean_test_score",
                 "sem_test_score"]]
```

```{python}
cv_res = cv_res.rename(columns = {"param_kneighborsclassifier__n_neighbors": "n_neighbors"})
```

```{python}
cv_res.nlargest(1, "mean_test_score")
```

```{python}
X_test = pokemon_test.drop(columns = ["Legendary"])
y_test = pokemon_test["Legendary"].copy()
``` 

```{python}
best_knn_clf = grid_search.best_estimator_
```

```{python}
best_knn_clf.score(X_test, y_test)
```
